objective: Reviewed the additive verify_lock primitive plus LockVerifyStatus/LockVerifyEntry types in core/src/registry.rs and the lib.rs re-export against the approved plan.
key_changes: All 8 plan/AC items met: types, verify_lock signature, wasm path resolution, status mapping, hash-format consistency, curated re-export, purely additive.
Independently ran cargo test verify_lock: 4 passed, 0 failed (161 filtered = 165 total, matches claim).
cargo clippy -p grove-cst --release --locked: clean, zero warnings.
Ok(None) on absent lock; NotFound->Missing; hash-eq->Match; diff->Mismatch; other I/O errors propagated with anyhow context (no silent swallow).
Fresh lock verifies all-Match: verify_lock reuses sha256() and write_lock_for pins wasm_sha256() delegating to same primitive.
Malformed entries (missing name/wasm) are continue-skipped, not unwrapped — deliberate non-panicking choice per plan-review advisory.
Doc comment correctly directs T07 to pass the resolved grove.lock file path, not a project root.
Tests authentic and meaningful (round-trip Match, tampered->Mismatch, nonexistent->Missing, absent->None).
Advisory (non-blocking): lock top-level version field not validated; fine for read-only advisory primitive.
Advisory (non-blocking): temp-test files share process id but use distinct name stems; no collision.
findings: All 8 plan/AC items met and independently verified.
cargo test verify_lock: 4/4 pass; clippy clean.
Correct Match/Mismatch/Missing/None signal mapping; errors propagated not swallowed.
Additive-only: no signature, lock-format, or Cargo.toml changes.
